mapper.sql: notice_id, title, content, writer, popup_enabled, pinned, visible, created_at, updated_at
mapper.update: ALTER TABLE notices ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS popup_enabled BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE
ALTER TABLE notices ADD COLUMN popup_enabled BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE
ALTER TABLE notices ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS pinned BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE
ALTER TABLE notices ADD COLUMN pinned BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE
ALTER TABLE notices ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS visible BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE
ALTER TABLE notices ADD COLUMN visible BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE
mapper.select: SELECT FROM notices WHERE visible = TRUE ORDER BY pinned DESC, created_at DESC, notice_id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT FROM notices ORDER BY pinned DESC, created_at DESC, notice_id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT FROM notices WHERE visible = TRUE AND popup_enabled = TRUE ORDER BY pinned DESC, created_at DESC, notice_id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notices (title, content, writer, popup_enabled, pinned, visible) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{writer}, #{popupEnabled}, #{pinned}, #{visible})
mapper.update: UPDATE notices SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, writer = #{writer}, popup_enabled = #{popupEnabled}, pinned = #{pinned}, visible = #{visible} WHERE notice_id = #{noticeId}
